headline: FedEx Corporation (FDX) Rose on Earnings Beat
summary: The London Company released its Q1 2026 investor letter for “The London Company Large Cap Strategy”. In early 2026, US equities declined, with the Russell 3000 falling 4% and the S&P posting losses. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The year started positively with a broad rally, but sentiment reversed in […]

headline: FedEX: Expecting Continued Delivery Strength Ahead Of Q4
summary: FedEx stock is up 13% YTD despite a recent dip. Learn what Express strength and the Freight spinoff mean for valuation ahead of Q4. Click to read more.

raw.headline: FedEX: Expecting Continued Delivery Strength Ahead Of Q4

headline: Trump's Iran Encore Sinks Nasdaq 2%, Oracle's Capex Tab Comes Due
summary: The Nasdaq lost 2% after Trump promised another round of strikes on Iran. A cooler CPI print barely registered. Super Micro cratered 28% on a $7B raise. Oracle beat the quarter but the capex number was the headline. Amazon walked into the LTL freight business and crushed the incumbents.

raw.headline: Trump's Iran Encore Sinks Nasdaq 2%, Oracle's Capex Tab Comes Due
raw.summary: The Nasdaq lost 2% after Trump promised another round of strikes on Iran. A cooler CPI print barely registered. Super Micro cratered 28% on a $7B raise. Oracle beat the quarter but the capex number was the headline. Amazon walked into the LTL freight business and crushed the incumbents.

headline: Amazon Hogs the Road As Freight Speeds Toward the Future
summary: The company is opening up its less-than-truckload service to all businesses, letting anyone reserve space by the pallet in its trucks.

raw.headline: Amazon Hogs the Road As Freight Speeds Toward the Future
